title: Botanica by Air Wick Room Spray Air Freshener Caribbean Wetiver & Sandalwood 236 ml
features: Refreshing Scent: Experience the invigorating blend of Caribbean Wetiver & Sandalwood, filling your room with a tropical, exotic aroma
Long-Lasting Freshness: Passive diffusion technology ensures continuous fragrance release, keeping your space fresh for up to 15 square meters
Easy Application: The convenient spray bottle allows for simple and quick application, providing instant freshness with just a press
Ideal for Rooms: Perfect for refreshing living rooms, bedrooms, or any other indoor space, leaving a clean and inviting atmosphere
Air Wick Quality: Trusted for their innovative air care solutions, Air Wick brings you a reliable and effective room spray for a fresh, comfortable home
description: Experience the invigorating blend of Caribbean Wetiver & Sandalwood with the Botanica by Air Wick Room Spray. This 236 ml bottle features a convenient spray form, perfect for freshening up your space. Measuring 5.6 cm in width, 8.8 cm in length, and 19.6 cm in height, it fits easily into any room decor. Ideal for rooms up to 15 square meters, this air freshener effectively neutralizes odors, leaving your space refreshed and inviting.
